text.title: Scope Creep Parking Lot Protocol Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the scope-creep-parking-lot-protocol methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pre-meeting-setup
step.action: Open visible parking-lot canvas; brief participants on protocol.

step.name: live-capture
step.action: Capture every ask verbatim with requester + timestamp.

step.name: post-meeting-triage
step.action: Within 24h, route each item through scope-change-vs-scope-creep classifier.

step.name: respond-and-route
step.action: Send 48h response per item; open change-control records as needed.

step.name: audit-weekly
step.action: Weekly rollup of counts + ageing; surface SLA breaches.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
